zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Millicent Bessylls於1334年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Roger Powell-3歲，母親Mrs. Powell-13歲。她於1377年與John Adams Lord of Llanllywel在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Millicent Bessylls于1334年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Roger Powell-3岁，母亲Mrs. Powell-13岁。她于1377年与John Adams Lord of Llanllywel在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Millicent Bessylls was born in 1334, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Roger Powell, was -3 and her mother, Mrs. Powell, was -13. She married John Adams Lord of Llanllywel in 1377, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1388, in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Millicent Bessylls est née en 1334, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Powell, avait -3 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Powell, avait -13 ans. Elle a épousé John Adams Lord of Llanllywel en 1377, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1388, à Charlton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Millicent Bessylls(이)가 1334년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Powell(은)는 -3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Powell(은)는 -13세였다. 그녀는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 John Adams Lord of Llanllywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 찰턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.
